info.name: Nelvora Companions
info.description: Custom companions, familiars, and Magatsu for the Nelvora setting.
info.author: RiverDoge

description.p: Mizu-Kagami is a Magatsu uniquely bound to an Utsuwa. Also known as the Steam Princess, she draws power from scalding moisture to execute devastating, evasive attacks.

setters.set: poison; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
blinded, charmed, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, unconscious

description.p: The Mizu-Kagami (The Scalded Mirror) provides their Utsuwa with the following spells:

sheet.description: The Mizu-Kagami provides their Utsuwa with the following spells: Cantrips (Frostbite, Ray of Frost), 1st (Sleep), 2nd (Heartstop), 3rd (Boil), 4th (Steam Blast), 5th (Prismatic Ray).

description.p: Mizu-Kagami has an immense affinity for drawing power from steam, or other water-adjacent forms of heat. When immersed in such an element, her abilities gain additional strength, and she gains the ability to use "Thousand-Petal Lotus-Bloom".

sheet.description: When immersed in steam or water-adjacent heat, Mizu's abilities gain additional strength, and she unlocks the Thousand-Petal Lotus-Bloom action.

description.p: Your attacks are imbued with the soul-sapping strength of a Yuge-Hime. You gain 1d4 cold damage to your attacks. Additionally, if your attack lands, you can force your opponent to make a Wisdom saving throw, or have their very life essence absorbed into your Fuin-Sho. On a failure, the enemy takes 1d10 cold damage + your Wisdom modifier, and you heal for that same amount. This ability can be used once per short rest, or once per-turn if Mizu is manifested (which upon dismissal, counts as your one use).

sheet.description: Attacks deal +1d4 cold damage. On a hit, force a Wis save. On failure: target takes 1d10 + Wis Mod cold damage, and you heal for that amount. Usable 1/short rest, or 1/turn while Mizu is manifested (dismissing her consumes the rest use).

description.p: Mizu can make two Refracting-Frost Needle attacks per turn. If Steam Princess is active, this second attack may be a "Thousand-Petal Lotus-Bloom" attack.

sheet.description: Mizu makes two Refracting-Frost Needle attacks. If Steam Princess is active, the second attack can be Thousand-Petal Lotus-Bloom.

description.p: Ranged Spell Attack: Utsuwa's Spell Attack to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 2d8 cold damage. If Steam Princess is active, this attack attempts to refract into an additional target. Make another Spell Attack roll, with advantage, towards any target within 30 ft of the original. This attack deals 1d8 cold damage.

sheet.description: Ranged Spell Attack: Utsuwa's Spell Attack to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 2d8 cold damage. If Steam Princess is active, refract to an additional target within 30 ft of the original (make a new attack roll with advantage). Hit: 1d8 cold damage.

description.p: While fully immersed in steam, Mizu-Kagami can compress the steam into a superheated Lotus, and explode it around her OR she can attempt to fling the Lotus at an enemy. If Mizu explodes the flower on herself, it deals 4d12 fire damage to all enemies within 15 ft, and 2d12 fire damage to herself. This attack ignores resistances to fire.

If Mizu attempts to fling the Lotus at a group of enemies, make a Ranged Spell Attack with her Utsuwa's Spell Attack to hit. This attack has a range of 30ft, and detonates with a range of 10 ft around the target, dealing 3d12 fire damage, and 1d8 cold damage to Mizu.

Once this action is used, Mizu is considered no longer immersed in steam until the end of her next turn. If the steam was a semi-permanent source (natural geyser or hotspring), the steam returns. Otherwise any temporary or conjured source is exhausted by this attack.

sheet.description: Requires Steam Princess. Explode on self: 4d12 fire damage to enemies within 15 ft, 2d12 fire damage to Mizu (ignores fire resistance). OR Fling: Ranged Spell Attack (30 ft range, 10 ft blast radius). Hit: 3d12 fire damage, 1d8 cold damage to Mizu. Exhausts the steam source temporarily or permanently.

description.p: Melee Weapon Attack: Utsuwa's Spell Attack to hit, reach 5 ft., one target of small or medium size. Hit: 1d6 fire, 1d6 cold damage, and the target is grappled, and is subject to the effects of Vapor Step, if Mizu chooses. Additionally, the target is temporarily stripped of any non-permanent resistance to fire and cold damage, gains a weakness to lightning damage, and counts as underwater for the duration of the grapple.

sheet.description: Melee Weapon Attack: Utsuwa's Spell Attack to hit, reach 5 ft., one Small/Medium target. Hit: 1d6 fire + 1d6 cold damage. Target is grappled, subject to Vapor Step teleportation, loses non-permanent fire/cold resistance, gains lightning vulnerability, and counts as underwater.

description.p: Mizu collapses into a cloud of mist and teleports up to 40 feet to an unoccupied space. Additionally, she creates a 10 ft cloud of fog in the space she arrives in, until the start of her next turn. This counts as a heavily obscured space. If the space she teleports onto is hot enough to be considered hazardous to enter (causes damage or burns, think lava or otherwise), this fog becomes steam, and can enable the ability Steam Princess until her next turn. Additionally, if an enemy is currently under the effects of "Drowning Embrace", Mizu can teleport them with her.

sheet.description: Teleport up to 40 ft. Leaves a 10 ft cloud of heavily obscured fog where she lands until her next turn. If the landing space is hot/hazardous, the fog becomes steam and activates Steam Princess. Can teleport a grappled enemy from Drowning Embrace.

description.p: While Mizu is manifested, the moisture on your blade is but another mirror for her to strike through. Upon landing an attack on an enemy, Mizu can manifest at the point of your blade, and make a Drowning Embrace action on the enemy you successfully struck. Immediately upon resolving this action, Mizu Vapor-Steps back to her previous location, no matter the distance, and brings the target with her. If the enemy is too large to be affected by the embrace, Mizu deals 1d12 fire damage, and 1d12 cold damage to them, but they are not teleported with her.

sheet.description: Trigger: You land an attack while Mizu is manifested. Mizu appears at your blade and uses Drowning Embrace on the target. She immediately Vapor-Steps back to her original location, dragging the target. If target is Large+, they take 1d12 fire + 1d12 cold instead of being embraced/teleported.

description.p: A Large Koma-Inu (Stone-Lion) originating from the Arakami (Fallen Temple Guardians).

setters.set: necrotic, radiant; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

description.p: The Sekka-Inu (Vermillion Sentinel) provides their Utsuwa with the following spells:

ul.li: 1st level: Shield of Faith, Earth Tremor
2nd level: Warding Bond, Maximilian’s Earthen Grasp
3rd level: Erupting Earth, Meld into Stone

sheet.description: Provides Utsuwa with: Cantrips (Mold Earth), 1st (Shield of Faith, Earth Tremor), 2nd (Warding Bond, Maximilian’s Earthen Grasp), 3rd (Erupting Earth, Meld into Stone).

description.p: You and your Utsuwa have Advantage on ability checks and saving throws to avoid being knocked Prone or moved against your will.

sheet.description: You and your Utsuwa have Advantage on ability checks and saving throws to avoid being knocked Prone or moved against your will.

description.p: While the Magatsu remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an inanimate stone statue.

sheet.description: While motionless, it is indistinguishable from an inanimate stone statue.

description.p: Melee Weapon Attack: + Utsuwa's Spell Attack modifier to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 + Proficiency bonus Force damage.

sheet.description: Melee Weapon Attack: + Utsuwa's Spell Attack mod to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 1d8 + PB Force damage.

description.p: If the Sekka-Inu moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature, it can use a Bonus Action to attempt to Shove that creature (knocking it Prone or pushing it 5 feet). It uses its Strength score for this check.

sheet.description: If it moves at least 15 ft straight toward a creature, it can attempt to Shove them (Prone or push 5 ft) using its Strength score.

description.p: When a creature within 10 feet of the Sekka-Inu hits you with an attack, it can use its Reaction to force the attacker to make a Strength Saving Throw against your Spell Save DC. On a failure, the attacker is knocked Prone.

sheet.description: Trigger: A creature within 10 ft hits you with an attack. Effect: The attacker must make a Str save vs your Spell Save DC or be knocked Prone.

description.p: A Small celestial, uniquely bound as Waelin's Pet, possessing a highly modular and adaptive physical form.
Inky can be activated using the Animating Performance Class feature. When doing so, their strength stat is elevated to 18, and they gain access to the Force Empowered Slam action.

sheet.description: Inky can be activated using the Animating Performance Class feature. When doing so, their strength stat is elevated to 18, and they gain access to the Force Empowered Slam action.

description.p: Due to the efforts of Kadmon, the Aspiring Forgemaster, Inky has obtained a "skeleton" of sorts. Alongside adopting a more rigid and stable physique, Inky has also obtained some new abilities as well.
Bone-Structure (Basic): Stone-Iron Ore
Spine: Fiscathian Steel
Skull (Orb): White-Pearl of the Dragon God

sheet.description: Due to the efforts of Kadmon, the Aspiring Forgemaster, Inky has obtained a "skeleton" of sorts. Alongside adopting a more rigid and stable physique, Inky has also obtained some new abilities as well. Current Skeleton: Bone-Structure (Basic): Stone-Iron Ore. Spine: Fiscathian Steel. Skull (Orb): White-Pearl of the Dragon God.

description.p: Beneath their shadowy form, Inky's "bones" are made of a rough stone material, one laden with blackish veins of some darker material. These ridges are cold to the touch, and barely clash with the more ink-borne exterior.

Passive Form: With the advent of their bone-structure, Inky has now been given a more static and clear appearance. What was once leaning on the amalgamation side is now a keen feline resemblance. While far from the extravagance existing within their skull, the Stone gives Inky a firm foundation. Alongside their more approachable appearance, Inky has also gained +1 AC.

Active Form: While their shadow swirls and morphs into a more ferocious state, the Stone also partially exudes out of their "skin", forming a solid Carapace. Their passive AC bonus from this feature doubles to +2, and they can use a reaction to harden their "carapace", giving them resistance to all forms of non-magical attacks until the end of their next turn. This ability can be used once per short-rest.
Stats Gained: +2 Strength

sheet.description: Beneath their shadowy form, Inky's "bones" are made of a rough stone material, one laden with blackish veins of some darker material. These ridges are cold to the touch, and barely clash with the more ink-borne exterior. Passive Form: With the advent of their bone-structure, Inky has now been given a more static and clear appearance. What was once leaning on the amalgamation side is now a keen feline resemblance. While far from the extravagance existing within their skull, the Stone gives Inky a firm foundation. Alongside their more approachable appearance, Inky has also gained +1 AC. Active Form: While their shadow swirls and morphs into a more ferocious state, the Stone also partially exudes out of their "skin", forming a solid Carapace. Their passive AC bonus from this feature doubles to +2, and they can use a reaction to harden their "carapace", giving them resistance to all forms of non-magical attacks until the end of their next turn. This ability can be used once per short-rest. Stats Gained: +2 Strength

description.p: Where the newly obtained Bone-Structure has given Inky "shape", this spine has completed the first stage of their Skeleton. As for a more standard being, Inky's spine allows them to move more freely, and has even granted them sturdiness beyond expected means. In the future, this piece will allow for even great additions to their being, but for now it's merely a sturdy foundation to be eventually grated upon.

Passive Form: Solid ridges press just below Inky's back, gently shifting as they walk around, and serving to connect their various parts to create a greater whole. While there is not a specific significant effect, Inky has gained a number of additional stats from this addition.

Active Form: Each blow from Inky has gained additional force, and their attacks have great reach as if their form has become more flexible. When transformed, Inky gains an additional +10 Walking Speed. Additionally, as a bonus action, Inky can extend their attack range to 10 ft until the start of their next turn. This ability can be used once per short-rest.
Stats Gained: +10 Walking Speed, +2 Strength, +1 Dexterity, +1 Constitution, +1 Challenge Rating, their Force-Empowered Slam is now a 1d12 instead of 1d10.

sheet.description: Where the newly obtained Bone-Structure has given Inky "shape", this spine has completed the first stage of their Skeleton. As for a more standard being, Inky's spine allows them to move more freely, and has even granted them sturdiness beyond expected means. In the future, this piece will allow for even great additions to their being, but for now it's merely a sturdy foundation to be eventually grated upon. Passive Form: Solid ridges press just below Inky's back, gently shifting as they walk around, and serving to connect their various parts to create a greater whole. While there is not a specific significant effect, Inky has gained a number of additional stats from this addition. Active Form: Each blow from Inky has gained additional force, and their attacks have great reach as if their form has become more flexible. When transformed, Inky gains an additional +10 Walking Speed. Additionally, as a bonus action, Inky can extend their attack range to 10 ft until the start of their next turn. This ability can be used once per short-rest. Stats Gained: +10 Walking Speed, +2 Strength, +1 Dexterity, +1 Constitution, +1 Challenge Rating, their Force-Empowered Slam is now a 1d12 instead of 1d10.

element.name: Skull: White-Pearl of the Dragon God

description.p: Due to their current "frame", Inky has a magical "White-Pearl" in place of their skull. It's an ominous yet powerful artifact obtained during an escapade. Currently little is known about the pearl, but it has already begun to grant Inky some minor effects, with more to be unlocked.

Passive Form: Shining brightly through Inky's eyes, the pearl gives off a radiant light whenever it is in the presence of powerful evil. While Inky is in their passive state, and touching Waelin, he has immunity to a new fear effect from any evil entity. Additionally, Inky can cast protection from good and evil once per week.

Active Form: Purifying light shunts off of Inky's shadow, lashing at any ill-begotten beings nearby, and shielding allies nearby. As an action, Ink can exude radiant light and gain 27 (4d10 + 5) Temporary Hit Points for 1 minute. Additionally, Inky takes half of the damage any friendly target within 10 feet takes, halving it for them. This effect ends when the Temporary Hit Points are exhausted.
Stats Gained: +1 Constitution, +3 Intelligence, +3 Wisdom, +2 Charisma, +2 Challenge Rating.

sheet.description: Due to their current "frame", Inky has a magical "White-Pearl" in place of their skull. It's an ominous yet powerful artifact obtained during an escapade. Currently little is known about the pearl, but it has already begun to grant Inky some minor effects, with more to be unlocked. Passive Form: Shining brightly through Inky's eyes, the pearl gives off a radiant light whenever it is in the presence of powerful evil. While Inky is in their passive state, and touching Waelin, he has immunity to a new fear effect from any evil entity. Additionally, Inky can cast protection from good and evil once per week. Active Form: Purifying light shunts off of Inky's shadow, lashing at any ill-begotten beings nearby, and shielding allies nearby. As an action, Ink can exude radiant light and gain 27 (4d10 + 5) Temporary Hit Points for 1 minute. Additionally, Inky takes half of the damage any friendly target within 10 feet takes, halving it for them. This effect ends when the Temporary Hit Points are exhausted. Stats Gained: +1 Constitution, +3 Intelligence, +3 Wisdom, +2 Charisma, +2 Challenge Rating.

description.p: Inky can consume and integrate various materials into its form. The materials "accepted" by Inky seem to be linked to its own will, but it will consume practically anything it is given, regardless of taking on their traits or not.
1. Waelin's Flower
2. Bag of Gold
3. Vial of Ink
4. Steel
5. Wood

sheet.description: Inky can consume and integrate various materials into its form. The materials "accepted" by Inky seem to be linked to its own will, but it will consume practically anything it is given, regardless of taking on their traits or not. Current Materials Absorbed: 1. Waelin's Flower. 2. Bag of Gold. 3. Vial of Ink. 4. Steel. 5. Wood.

description.p: This material is a living flower from Waelin’s own body, imbued with a gentle, life-giving energy.

Passive Form: When this material is dominant, the inky swirls within Inky’s core take on the faint, shifting pattern of the flower’s petals, and it emits a subtle, pleasant floral scent. Its creator gains advantage on Wisdom (Medicine) checks made to stabilize a dying creature.

Active Form: Inky’s amorphous form is flecked with shimmering, petal-like motes of light. It gains the Soothing Touch action. Once per long rest, Inky can touch a creature and restore a number of hit points equal to 1d10 + its creator’s Charisma modifier.

sheet.description: This material is a living flower from Waelin's own body, imbued with a gentle, life-giving energy. Passive Form: When this material is dominant, the inky swirls within Inky's core take on the faint, shifting pattern of the flower's petals, and it emits a subtle, pleasant floral scent. Its creator gains advantage on Wisdom (Medicine) checks made to stabilize a dying creature. Active Form: Inky's amorphous form is flecked with shimmering, petal-like motes of light. It gains the Soothing Touch action. Once per long rest, Inky can touch a creature and restore a number of hit points equal to 1d10 + its creator's Charisma modifier.

description.p: Inky has assimilated a notable quantity of precious gold, absorbing its association with wealth and allure.

Passive Form: The surface of Inky’s core gains a brilliant, liquid-gold sheen. While carrying it, its creator has advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks when interacting with individuals who are motivated by wealth or status. Additionally, Inky has a penchant for stealing small bits and bobs.

Active Form: Inky’s body glitters with a distracting golden light. As a reaction when a creature Inky can see targets it with an attack, it can flash this light, imposing disadvantage on the attack roll. It can use this feature a number of times equal to its creator’s proficiency bonus, regaining all uses on a long rest.

sheet.description: Inky has assimilated a notable quantity of precious gold, absorbing its association with wealth and allure. Passive Form: The surface of Inky's core gains a brilliant, liquid-gold sheen. While carrying it, its creator has advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks when interacting with individuals who are motivated by wealth or status. Additionally, Inky has a penchant for stealing small bits and bobs. Active Form: Inky's body glitters with a distracting golden light. As a reaction when a creature Inky can see targets it with an attack, it can flash this light, imposing disadvantage on the attack roll. It can use this feature a number of times equal to its creator's proficiency bonus, regaining all uses on a long rest.

description.p: This is not common ink, but a special blend used by Waelin, tying directly to the substance that helped give Inky life. It resonates with properties of shadow and secrecy.
Passive Form: Inky’s core becomes a deep, matte black that seems to absorb the light around it. Its creator gains a +3 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks.
Active Form: Inky’s form is exceptionally dark and coalesces with nearby shadows. It can take the Hide action as a bonus action while in dim light or darkness.

sheet.description: This is not common ink, but a special blend used by Waelin, tying directly to the substance that helped give Inky life. It resonates with properties of shadow and secrecy. Passive Form: Inky's core becomes a deep, matte black that seems to absorb the light around it. Its creator gains a +3 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks. Active Form: Inky's form is exceptionally dark and coalesces with nearby shadows. It can take the Hide action as a bonus action while in dim light or darkness.

description.p: A simple but reliable material, steel imparts straightforward martial resilience.
Passive Form: The alloy core feels heavier and its surface takes on the appearance of hammered steel. While it's active, their creator gains +2 bonus to their Armor Class.

Active Form: Inky’s form hardens, and its slam attacks are now considered magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage. It also gains resistance to physical damage from nonmagical attacks.

sheet.description: A simple but reliable material, steel imparts straightforward martial resilience. Passive Form: The alloy core feels heavier and its surface takes on the appearance of hammered steel. While it's active, their creator gains +2 bonus to their Armor Class. Active Form: Inky's form hardens, and its slam attacks are now considered magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage. It also gains resistance to physical damage from nonmagical attacks.

description.p: This wood, whether common or rare, connects Inky to the steadfast and resilient nature of the wild.
Passive Form: A faint, shifting wood grain pattern appears across Inky’s surface. Its creator has advantage on Wisdom (Nature) checks.
Active Form: Inky’s body becomes fibrous and tough. Its walking and climbing speeds increase to 80 feet, and it cannot be knocked prone.

sheet.description: This wood, whether common or rare, connects Inky to the steadfast and resilient nature of the wild. Passive Form: A faint, shifting wood grain pattern appears across Inky's surface. Its creator has advantage on Wisdom (Nature) checks. Active Form: Inky's body becomes fibrous and tough. Its walking and climbing speeds increase to 80 feet, and it cannot be knocked prone.

description.p: Melee Weapon Attack: Waelin's Spell Casting Modifier to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d12 + Waelin's Proficiency bonus force damage.

sheet.description: Melee Weapon Attack: Waelin's Spell Casting Modifier to hit, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d12 + Waelin's Proficiency bonus force damage.
